case_title: MERCEDES GUEVARA VS. TAMAN RASHAD LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF GUEVARA, MERCEDES AS TO DEFENDANT TAMAN RASHAD LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GUEVARA, MERCEDES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TAMAN RASHAD LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY $10,474.91 PRINCIPAL, $106.00 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,950.91, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
